rationale: TC-044 Playwright test added at e2e/graph.spec.ts asserts node-bbox/node-bbox non-overlap and label-bbox/foreign-circle non-overlap on a 48-node fixture after settle. Execution result_rev=d5303b7d records task_succeeded; existing graph e2e suite preserved.

findings.summary: Test uses a 48-node fixture rather than the 128-node TC-043 fixture; reasonable trade-off for runtime while still exercising hubs/cross-links.
Overlap loops break after >5 violations to keep failure messages bounded; assertion still fires correctly.
